# Utenriksdepartementet

*21 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Cancelli-Promemoria](../lover/lov-1812-02-25.html) | Prom. ang. Territorial Grænse | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1812-02-25) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1812-02-25.md) |
| [Forbud paa Vimpel-Føring](../lover/lov-1741-02-17.html) | Forbud paa Vimpel-føring | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1741-02-17) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1741-02-17.md) |
| [Konvensjon mellom Norge, Danmark, Finnland, Island og Sverige om inndriving av u](../lover/lov-1962-03-23.html) | Nordisk konvensjon om underholdsbidrag | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1962-03-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1962-03-23.md) |
| [Lov om Norges Flag [flaggloven]](../lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.html) | Flaggloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1898-12-10-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1898-12-10-1.md) |
| [Lov om Norges kontinentalsokkel](../lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.html) | Lov om Norges kontinentalsokkel | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-06-18-89) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-06-18-89.md) |
| [Lov om Norges territorialfarvann og tilstøtende sone [territorialfarvannsloven]](../lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.html) | Territorialfarvannsloven – terfl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-06-27-57) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-06-27-57.md) |
| [Lov om Statens investeringsfond for næringsvirksomhet i utviklingsland (Norfundl](../lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.html) | Norfundloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1997-05-09-26) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1997-05-09-26.md) |
| [Lov om betalingsutjevning [betalingsutjevningsloven]](../lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.html) | Betalingsutjevningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1935-05-31-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1935-05-31-2.md) |
| [Lov om en overgangsperiode ved Storbritannias uttreden av EU](../lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.html) | Lov om en overgangsperiode ved Storbritannias uttreden av EU | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2019-03-29-8) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) · [v2019](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2019/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2019-03-29-8.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av Konvensjonen om forbod mot utvikling, produksjon, lagrin](../lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.html) | Lov om konvensjon om kjemiske våpen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1994-05-06-10) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1994-05-06-10.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av Konvensjonen om forbud mot bruk, lagring, produksjon og ](../lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.html) | Lov om Konvensjonen mot antipersonellminer | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1998-07-17-54) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1998-07-17-54.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av Konvensjonen om klaseammunisjon](../lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.html) | Klaseammunisjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-05-15-28) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-05-15-28.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av Traktat om totalforbod mot kjernefysiske prøvesprenginga](../lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.html) | Lov om traktat mot kjernefysiske prøvesprengingar | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-06-18-40) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-06-18-40.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring av internasjonale sanksjoner (sanksjonsloven)](../lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.html) | Sanksjonsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-04-16-18) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-04-16-18.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring i norsk rett av hoveddelen i avtale om Det europeiske økono](../lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.html) | EØS-loven – EØSL | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-11-27-109) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-11-27-109.md) |
| [Lov om innførsle- og utførsleregulering](../lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.html) | Innførsle- og utførslereguleringslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1997-06-06-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1997-06-06-32.md) |
| [Lov om inspeksjoner i samsvar med Avtalen om konvensjonelle styrker i Europa (CF](../lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.html) | Lov om inspeksjoner av styrker i Europa | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-05-29-50) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-05-29-50.md) |
| [Lov om kontroll med eksport av strategiske varer, tjenester og teknologi m.v. [e](../lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.html) | Eksportkontrolloven – ekspktrl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1987-12-18-93) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1987-12-18-93.md) |
| [Lov om utenrikstjenesten (utenrikstjenesteloven)](../lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.html) | Utenrikstjenesteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-02-13-9) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-02-13-9.md) |
| [Samarbeidsavtale mellom Norge, Danmark, Finland, Island og Sverige [Helsingforsa](../lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.html) | Helsingforsavtalen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1962-03-23-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1962-03-23-2.md) |
| [Traktat mellem Norge, Amerikas Forente Stater, Danmark, Frankrike, Italia, Japan](../lover/lov-1920-02-09.html) | Svalbardtraktaten | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1920-02-09) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1920-02-09.md) |
